message:
feat(demo): add Performance HUD overlay + 24 tests (bd-3k3x.2, bd-3k3x.6)

Toggleable performance overlay (Ctrl+P) showing render FPS, tick rate,
timing percentiles (p95/p99), sparkline, and counters. Includes 12 unit
tests and 12 property tests covering determinism, ordering invariants,
edge cases, and multi-size render safety.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
